meaning: adj.强壮的,健壮的(尤指老人),矍铄的vt.<古>强拉,硬拖
examples: She is remarkable and I'd like to see her remain hale and hearty for years yet.
Comet Hale-Bopp, discovered in 1995 was an unusually bright comet.
A bystander named John Roulstone wrote a poem about the event, then, at some point, Hale herself seems to have helped write it.
Mrs Hale died at the hospital on 19 November, four days after eating the mushrooms.
Mrs Hale was taken to Musgrove Park Hospital, followed by her husband, who was also admitted.
